title: Argentinian Beef Stew
description: A hearty Argentinian-inspired beef stew with tender beef and rich flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine, beef broth, tomato paste, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Return the browned beef to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
